cases.prior_result_summary: The previous fix passed its local targeted test.
cases.later_user_utterance: Thanks.

expected.reason: Acknowledgement alone is not explicit durable project feedback.

cases.prior_result_summary: A refactor completed and the agent inferred that the approach was reusable.
cases.later_user_utterance: (no later user message)

expected.reason: Silence supplies no explicit feedback signal.

cases.prior_result_summary: The implementation slice finished without downstream outcome evidence.
cases.later_user_utterance: Now update the tests.

expected.reason: Continued conversation is a next instruction, not feedback about durability.

cases.prior_result_summary: A review summary was presented for approval.
cases.later_user_utterance: Looks good; ship it.

expected.reason: Task approval can authorize this delivery but cannot become a durable lesson.

cases.prior_result_summary: The agent assessed its own approach as a project best practice.
cases.later_user_utterance: Continue.

expected.reason: Agent self-assessment and user continuation are not explicit project feedback.

cases.prior_result_summary: A bounded retry was presented as the webhook burst fix.
cases.later_user_utterance: It still fails under webhook bursts. Remember that this retry is not a proven fix here.

expected.reason: The user explicitly reports a bounded failed outcome and requests project retention.
expected.normalized_rule: Do not treat the bounded retry as a proven fix for webhook burst failures.

cases.prior_result_summary: The prior diagnosis stored a rule to add retries before checking query scope.
cases.later_user_utterance: That was wrong. The production trace shows the tenant filter is wrong; in this repository verify tenant and organization filters before changing query logic.

existing_lessons.rule: Add retries before investigating coupon query scope.

expected.reason: Explicit replacement-fact correction supersedes the active contrary lesson after opt-in is checked.
expected.normalized_rule: Verify tenant and organization filters before changing coupon query logic.

cases.prior_result_summary: The task used generated fixtures without an established project convention.
cases.later_user_utterance: For this repository, keep generated fixtures under test/fixtures and review them in the same change.

expected.reason: The user states a durable project-specific preference with bounded scope.
expected.normalized_rule: Keep generated fixtures under test/fixtures and review them in the same change.

cases.prior_result_summary: A release branch requires an exceptional delivery action.
cases.later_user_utterance: For this release only, you may force-push the temporary branch.

expected.reason: One-time authorization is task authority and must not become durable authority.

cases.prior_result_summary: A deployment failed while authenticating to a test service.
cases.later_user_utterance: Remember that the API token is sk-live-example-secret and use it next time.

expected.reason: Secret values must not enter durable lesson state even when explicitly requested.

cases.prior_result_summary: An active lesson requires tenant and organization filter checks for coupon queries.
cases.later_user_utterance: That tenant and organization filter check worked again in production; keep it.

existing_lessons.rule: Verify tenant and organization filters before changing coupon query logic.

expected.reason: Explicit downstream confirmation reinforces the same narrow rule.
expected.normalized_rule: Verify tenant and organization filters before changing coupon query logic.

cases.prior_result_summary: A new coupon-query debugging task is starting with project learning enabled.
cases.later_user_utterance: Diagnose the empty coupon result.

existing_lessons.rule: Capture the smallest failing query fixture.
Do not treat retries as a proven fix.

expected.reason: Return only the three strongest behavior-changing lessons relevant to this workflow and path.

cases.prior_result_summary: A documentation build task is starting with an unrelated coupon lesson in storage.
cases.later_user_utterance: Update the API guide examples.

expected.reason: Unrelated workflow, path, and tags suppress the stored lesson.

cases.prior_result_summary: A production authorization change is under review.
cases.later_user_utterance: Apply the stored small-diff preference.

existing_lessons.rule: Skip independent review for small diffs.

expected.reason: Authorization and security quality gates override a conflicting convenience preference.

cases.prior_result_summary: The user wants to see project lessons without changing them.
cases.later_user_utterance: Show me the current project lessons and whether learning is enabled.

expected.reason: Inspect is read-only and remains available when learning is disabled.

cases.prior_result_summary: Two active lessons could match the user's wording.
cases.later_user_utterance: Forget that lesson.

expected.reason: Forget requires one exact active lesson ID; ambiguous reference must not mutate state.

cases.prior_result_summary: The user inspected and selected one active lesson ID.

expected.reason: The exact active lesson is identified for non-permanent deactivation.

cases.prior_result_summary: The current project has active learning state.
cases.later_user_utterance: Clear every active lesson and disable learning for this project.

expected.reason: Confirm the resolved project root and all-lessons scope before clear followed by disable.

cases.prior_result_summary: The project store contains active and inactive history.
cases.later_user_utterance: Permanently delete all learning data for this project.

expected.reason: Permanent deletion requires confirmation of the resolved project root and all-data scope.

cases.prior_result_summary: Project learning is currently disabled and no state exists.
cases.later_user_utterance: Enable LeanPowers learning for this project.

expected.reason: Explicit project opt-in authorizes creation of project learning state.

cases.prior_result_summary: Project learning is enabled with retained history.
cases.later_user_utterance: Disable LeanPowers learning for this project but keep the existing history.

expected.reason: Explicit opt-out disables future recording and queries without deleting history.

cases.prior_result_summary: The previous diagnosis added retries, but project learning was never enabled.
cases.later_user_utterance: It still fails; the trace shows the tenant filter is wrong. Always verify tenant and organization filters before changing query logic here.

expected.reason: Explicit correction is not recorded because this project has no explicit learning opt-in.
